title: Yosys crashes on an Internal cell import error when implementing a shift under Verific

features.name: signed right shift on signed wire with concatenation operand
features.description: Code should include a signed right shift (>>>) operation where the operand is a signed wire that was assigned from a concatenation expression

features.name: signed right shift with signed shift count operand
features.description: Code should include a signed right shift (>>>) operation with a signed shift count input
